name: open-skills
description: Reusable, inspectable skills for AI coding agents. Every skill has a readable SKILL.md; 39 of 57 also carry a declarative protocol.yon whose structure can be validated with @younndai/yon-parser. Validation does not enforce runtime obedience. A personal project by Alexandru Mares, separate from the YounndAI™ product portfolio. Read before you trust.
